_doc: Machine-readable reprobe ledger for ops/pricing/refresh-servable-allowlist.py. Keys are platform/model pairs. watchlist entries are transient or unconfirmed and must be re-probed before freshness expires; skiplist/deadlist entries are not allowed to re-enter a servable allowlist without editing this file with evidence.
